A.text: A thin band above and below the disk, but not near the center

C.text: The inner parts of the disk, close to the black hole

parsed.answer_value: The inner parts of the disk, close to the black hole
parsed.rationale: In the middle stage, the inner parts of the disk, close to the black hole, are depicted with the brightest colors, indicating the highest energy density. The colors transition from bright yellow to orange, suggesting higher energy near the center.
